meaning_kannada: ಇಲ್ಲದ ಕಲ್ಪಿತ ಶತ್ರುಗಳೊಂದಿಗೆ ಹೋರಾಡುವುದು (Kalpita shatrugalondige horata)
meaning_english: To fight imaginary enemies or waste time fighting non-existent problems.

meaning_kannada: ವ್ಯಕ್ತಿಯ ಅಂತಿಮ ಸಾಧನೆ ಅಥವಾ ವಿದಾಯದ ಭಾಷಣ (Antima sadhane)
meaning_english: The final performance or work of an artist or professional before retirement or death.

meaning_kannada: ತಡರಾತ್ರಿಯವರೆಗೆ ಕಷ್ಟಪಟ್ಟು ಓದುವುದು ಅಥವಾ ಕೆಲಸ ಮಾಡುವುದು (Tadaratrivarege kelasa)
meaning_english: To work or study late into the night.
A decisive test to prove the quality or truth of something.
To be as good as someone or something else (usually used in negative).

word: To take the bull by the horns
meaning_kannada: ಸಂಕಷ್ಟವನ್ನು ಧೈರ್ಯದಿಂದ ನೇರವಾಗಿ ಎದುರಿಸುವುದು (Kashtavannu dhairyadinda edurisuvudu)
meaning_english: To face a difficult situation directly and courageously.

meaning_kannada: ಭಾರಿ ನಷ್ಟದ ನಂತರ ಸಿಕ್ಕ ಗೆಲುವು (Bhari nashtada geluvu)
meaning_english: A victory that comes at such a high cost that it is not worth winning.

meaning_kannada: ಸಾಧ್ಯವಿರುವ ಎಲ್ಲ ಪ್ರಯತ್ನಗಳನ್ನು ಮಾಡುವುದು (Ella prayatna maduvudu)
meaning_english: To try every possible way to achieve something.
To issue a formal challenge to someone.

meaning_kannada: ಶಾಂತಿಯ ಸಂಕೇತ ಅಥವಾ ರಾಜಿ ಪ್ರಸ್ತಾಪ (Shantiya sanketa)
meaning_english: A gesture of peace or a desire to end a conflict.
To avoid someone or something entirely.
To prevent someone or something from approaching or causing problems.
An unpleasant fact that is difficult to accept.
To reveal a secret prematurely or by accident.
To lose one's temper and become very angry.
To take a subordinate or less important role.

meaning_kannada: ಸರಿಯಾದ ಸಮಯಕ್ಕಿಂತ ಮೊದಲೇ ಕೆಲಸ ಮಾಡುವುದು (Samayakkinta modale kelasa)
meaning_english: To do something before the appropriate or expected time.
To keep something secret or concealed.
An embarrassing secret that someone wants to keep hidden.
To accept the unpleasant consequences of one's actions.
To be extremely cautious about what one says or does around someone.

meaning_kannada: ಸದಾ ಜಗಳಕ್ಕೆ ಸಿದ್ಧನಿರುವುದು ಅಥವಾ ಹಳೆಯ ಕೋಪ (Haleya kopa)
meaning_english: To have an angry or resentful attitude due to past slights.

word: To bite off more than one can chew
meaning_kannada: ಶಕ್ತಿ ಮೀರಿದ ಕೆಲಸವನ್ನು ಒಪ್ಪಿಕೊಳ್ಳುವುದು (Shakti meerida kelasa)
meaning_english: To take on a task that is too big or difficult to handle.

word: To bark up the wrong tree
meaning_english: To follow a mistaken line of thought or action.

word: To hit the nail on the head
meaning_english: To describe exactly what is causing a situation or problem.
To be unable to make a decision or take a side.
To agree fully with someone.

word: To give the benefit of the doubt
meaning_english: To accept someone's explanation despite having some doubt.
To do more than is expected of you.

word: To let the cat out of the bag
meaning_english: To accidentally reveal a secret.
